title: Resolve, to Study and Oversee Water in the State of Maine
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 13, 2025
last_house_action: 2/25/2025 - The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/13/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
